field.name: watched_field_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ ref('base.field_res_partner__street'), ref('base.field_res_partner__street2'), ref('base.field_res_partner__city'), ref('base.field_res_partner__zip'), ref('base.field_res_partner__country_id'), ref('base.field_res_partner__state_id'), ref('base.field_res_partner__email'), ref('base.field_res_partner__phone'), ref('base.field_res_partner__website'), ref('base.field_res_partner__vat'), ref('base.field_res_partner__lang'), ])]
